memories.memory: The user told the AI that he tried making pasta today and the sauce turned out perfectly. The AI said that the joy of cooking lies in creation and sharing.
The user asked the AI how to improve sleep quality. The AI suggested keeping a regular schedule and reading physical books or listening to light music before bedtime.
The user told the AI that his grandmother is already 82 years old and the eldest elder in the whole family. The AI said that an elderly person in the family is like a treasure.

The user told the AI that his client General Manager Zhang is 55 years old and has a great reputation in the business world. The AI said that achievement is not entirely determined by age, but experience can indeed bring wisdom.

The user told the AI that a junior he knows only scored 65 points in the final exam and is feeling a bit down. The AI said that a single setback doesn't mean anything; the key is to summarize experience and lessons.
The user asked the AI how to improve work efficiency. The AI suggested using time management tools, breaking down big tasks into small steps, and avoiding multitasking.
The user asked the AI how to choose a pillow suitable for oneself. The AI suggested choosing pillows of different heights and support according to sleeping positions (supine, side lying).
The user told the AI that he went skiing on the weekend and it was a lot of fun even though he fell a few times. The AI said that trying new sports is a great life experience.
